title: Best ytmnd ever _
wikitext:
[]: Best ytmnd ever ;_;             Quote Post by chiefen » Tue Oct 04, 2005 12:35 pm http://theendof4chan.ytmnd.com/ This is great!

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Oct 04, 2005 12:46 pm OMG LOL!

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Tue Oct 04, 2005 2:31 pm Definitely one of the best EVAR!!!!

[]: 100th post.             Quote Post by The Sandman » Tue Oct 04, 2005 3:01 pm WTF!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Shnooks » Tue Oct 04, 2005 3:26 pm xD that is friggin hilarious. 4Chan is the scariest place ever.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Tue Oct 04, 2005 3:29 pm It's the Longcat that completes the total effect. Maybe if I went to 4chan more it have been less of a WTF, but still incredibly funny.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei_Unit00 » Tue Oct 04, 2005 4:51 pm That was... hilarious, but so weird.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Oct 04, 2005 5:05 pm

[]:             Quote Post by S.O.M » Tue Oct 04, 2005 5:21 pm LMAO! That was one of the most wtf ytmnd I seen so far. But still GREATNESS!

[]:             Quote Post by mike » Tue Oct 04, 2005 6:49 pm I'll have to agree with Monkey here. What is 4chan? From what I could tell this is some kind of forum in-joke, but i fail to get most of the alusions. Furthermore, what does ytmnd stand for?

[]: ^_^ \/,,             Quote Post by chiefen » Tue Oct 04, 2005 8:23 pm mike wrote: I'll have to agree with Monkey here. What is 4chan? From what I could tell this is some kind of forum in-joke, but i fail to get most of the alusions. Furthermore, what does ytmnd stand for?

[]:             Quote Post by geishaboy » Tue Oct 04, 2005 10:17 pm 4chan eh? Sounds like a real "Special" kind of forum. Although I heard it was one huge Lolicon based website :?

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Wed Oct 05, 2005 12:28 am geishaboy wrote: 4chan eh? Sounds like a real "Special" kind of forum. Although I heard it was one huge Lolicon based website :?

[]:             Quote Post by Takumi Fujiwara » Wed Oct 05, 2005 1:14 am geishaboy wrote: 4chan eh? Sounds like a real "Special" kind of forum. Although I heard it was one huge Lolicon based website :?

[]:             Quote Post by geishaboy » Wed Oct 05, 2005 1:46 am The "4chan" and "not 4chan" comments had me a bit confused, so I googled them both I now I see the direct difference between them. Sorry about the mix up. :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Wed Oct 05, 2005 3:39 am Hilarious! Thanks for the explainer, chiefen 8)

[]:             Quote Post by Titus » Wed Oct 05, 2005 3:45 am :shock: - i wish i felt like laughing, classic non the less

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Wed Oct 05, 2005 11:19 am This 4chan places sounds like the logical conclusion of where USENET was going. It's nice to see the bar being prudently lowered to a level that is not entirely without merit.

[]:             Quote Post by Heidroch » Sun Nov 13, 2005 4:07 am There's also another Eva YTMD parody currently being updated. http://evaytmndopening.ytmnd.com/

[]:             Quote Post by Eternal Yamcha » Sun Nov 13, 2005 4:48 am Both ytmnds and the person (or people) who created them will burn in hell some day. Seriously, I have only found one or two to be anywhere near remotely funny. The original ytmnd that this thread was made about was sort of funny.
summary:
[]: Best ytmnd ever ;_;             Quote Post by chiefen » Tue Oct 04, 2005 12:35 pm http://theendof4chan.ytmnd.com/ This is great!

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Oct 04, 2005 12:46 pm OMG LOL!

[]:             Quote Post by Digitalex » Tue Oct 04, 2005 2:31 pm Definitely one of the best EVAR!!!!

[]: 100th post. &nbs
